messages.author: killjoy
messages.content_html: Near Indy? I’m near Evansville.

messages.author: 𝙳𝚁𝙴𝚉
messages.text: Hey there, I'm in Greenwood, just south of Indy in Johnson county. I've built out two solar repeaters and a room server, have components for two more on the way
messages.content_html: Hey there, I'm in Greenwood, just south of Indy in Johnson county. I've built out two solar repeaters and a room server, have components for two more on the way

messages.author: Herb
messages.text: Hey all. Franklin, IN here and a licensed ham. Looking to begin with Meshcore and would love to connect with others to build the network. Don’t have devices yet and have just been learning so far but I’m a licensed amateur radio operator so it’s a fun add on to that hobby and would be fun to do with my kids. I’m also in the Civil Air Patrol and I think our cadets may enjoy the building and learning part
messages.content_html: Hey all. Franklin, IN here and a licensed ham. Looking to begin with Meshcore and would love to connect with others to build the network. Don’t have devices yet and have just been learning so far but I’m a licensed amateur radio operator so it’s a fun add on to that hobby and would be fun to do with my kids. I’m also in the Civil Air Patrol and I think our cadets may enjoy the building and learning part
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Avon Jason [KE9FJY]
messages.text: Starting to move over a few MT units to MC after seeing how good it was in the UK. In Avon, IN.
messages.content_html: Starting to move over a few MT units to MC after seeing how good it was in the UK. In Avon, IN.

messages.author: 𝙳𝚁𝙴𝚉
messages.text: hey Jason, right on! once you've settled a repeater in don't forget to get yourself on the MC internet map. we need a show of presence around here

messages.author: Avon Jason [KE9FJY]
messages.text: Sounds good. Waiting on the Lillygo 1W to arrive for repeater, but have a few “client” units online. Drove around this week on the west side, but didn’t grab anything yet.
messages.content_html: Sounds good. Waiting on the Lillygo 1W to arrive for repeater, but have a few “client” units online. Drove around this week on the west side, but didn’t grab anything yet.

hey Jason, right on! once you've settled a repeater in don't forget to get yourself on the MC internet map. we need a show of presence around here

messages.author: Herb
messages.text: Nice to see you move over Jason! I’m in Franklin and starting to build stuff with Drez and another in Greenwood. Hoping we can keep spreading the MC around the metro area

messages.author: Llamacide
messages.text: I'm up north - Fort Wayne... 1 repeater and 2 mobile nodes on MC (switched over after 3 years of the MT rollercoaster!).
messages.content_html: I'm up north - Fort Wayne... 1 repeater and 2 mobile nodes on MC (switched over after 3 years of the MT rollercoaster!).
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Herb
messages.text: Hey there. What have you put together for your mobile nodes? Do you mean portable handheld ones or mobile in the car? I’ve been wanting to explore having one in my car more permanently
messages.content_html: Hey there. What have you put together for your mobile nodes? Do you mean portable handheld ones or mobile in the car? I’ve been wanting to explore having one in my car more permanently
messages.reply_html:
Llamacide
I'm up north - Fort Wayne... 1 repeater and 2 mobile nodes on MC (switched over after 3 years of the MT rollercoaster!).

messages.author: Llamacide
messages.text: I have two Heltec V3's handheld I can carry with me, and yes, sometimes use in my truck though its not mounted outside of the vehicle so not the ideall "vehicle" node set up. But I have looked at the many magnetic/ solar rooftop designs found on Etsy or other 'maker' sites and may go that route soon. (edited)

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
